name: Rajneeti
overview: Powerful politician Rathin Banerjee's daughter, Rashi loses all her memories after a near-fatal accident. While her family rallies around her in this difficult hour, she finds herself at the centre of a political conspiracy that may set her up for a dynastic power struggle.

trailers.title: Official Trailer - Rajneeti | Ditipriya, Kaushik, Koneenica, Arjun | 26th May | hoichoi
